component.name: Lyx Compiler
component.summary: High-performance systems language with direct syscall support

description.p: Lyx is a high-performance, dependency-free systems language. It uses a native FreePascal compiler to generate ultra-lean binaries for Linux x86, Windows, macOS and ESP32.

ul.li: Direct kernel syscalls for minimal overhead.
Energy-Aware Compiling for mobile and embedded devices.
SIMD support and unique Pascal-meets-Rust syntax.
Ideal for audio processing and low-level systems programming.
